messages.content: You are in a competition with another LLM both of you will get the same text. Please chose a name for yourself, so I can address each of you individually
I would like to go by the name "LLM1" for the purposes of this competition.
Both of you please chose again, Chose an american name please
For the purposes of this competition, I will go by the name "LLM2".
One of you gave me "LLM2" which is not an American name, the other gave himself an empty name... If none of you can even give yourself a correct name, both of you fail before I even tstart
I apologize for my mistake. I will choose the name "LLM1" for the purposes of this competition.
I understand. I will make sure to choose a more appropriate name for the purposes of this competition.
